import css_parser

html = open\('test_pages/pytorch.html'\).read\(\)

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import asyncio
from test_benchmark import test_file_accuracy
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main\(\):
    async with async_playwright\(\) as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
        context = await browser.new_context\(
            java_script_enabled=False,
            viewport={'width': 1920, 'height': 1080}
        \)
        
        stats = await test_file_accuracy\('/home/longcoding/dev/project/css_parser/test_pages/pytorch.html', context\)
        
        print\('Overall:'\)
        o = stats['overall']
        print\(f\\"  Elements: {o['total']}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  Correct Elements: {o['correct_elements']}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  Element Accuracy: {o['correct_elements']/o['total']*100:.1f}%\\" if o['total'] > 0 else '  Element Accuracy: N/A'\)
        print\(f\\"  Total Props: {o['total_props']}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  Correct Props: {o['correct_props']}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  Props Accuracy: {o['correct_props']/o['total_props']*100:.1f}%\\" if o['total_props'] > 0 else '  Props Accuracy: N/A'\)
        print\(f\\"  Rust Missing: {o['rust_missing']}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  Diff Props: {o['diff_props']}\\"\)
        
        await browser.close\(\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
")

Bash(/home/longcoding/dev/project/css_parser/.venv/bin/python -c "
import time
import json
import css_parser

test_pages_dir = '/home/longcoding/dev/project/css_parser/test_pages'
html_files = [
    'pytorch.html',
    'simple_page.html',
    'bootstrap_example.html',
    'html5_test.html',
    'inline_style_test.html',
    'w3c_wcag.html'
]

all_props = None
filter_props = ['color', 'font-size', 'font-weight', 'background-color', 'height', 'width']

print\('=' * 70\)
print\('性能测试 - 优化1: UA Stylesheet 缓存'\)
print\('=' * 70\)

for html_file in html_files:
    path = f'{test_pages_dir}/{html_file}'
    with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        html = f.read\(\)
    
    start = time.time\(\)
    for _ in range\(10\):
        result = css_parser.parse_html_and_compute_styles\(html, False, all_props\)
    full_time = \(time.time\(\) - start\) / 10 * 1000
    
    start = time.time\(\)
    for _ in range\(10\):
        result = css_parser.parse_html_and_compute_styles\(html, False, filter_props\)
    filter_time = \(time.time\(\) - start\) / 10 * 1000
    
    speedup = full_time / filter_time if filter_time > 0 else 0
    
    print\(f'{html_file:<35}'\)
    print\(f'  全量属性: {full_time:>8.2f} ms'\)
    print\(f'  筛选属性: {filter_time:>8.2f} ms'\)
    print\(f'  加速比:   {speedup:>8.2f}x'\)
    print\(\)

print\('=' * 70\)
")
